title: Course Objectives
content: What are the main learning objectives for this course?

title: Assignment Deadlines
content: What are all the assignment deadlines and due dates in this course?

title: Grading Breakdown
content: How is my grade calculated? What percentage is each assignment, exam, or project worth?

title: Required Textbooks
content: What textbooks or materials do I need to buy or access for this course?

title: Attendance Policy
content: What is the attendance policy? How many absences am I allowed?

title: Exam Schedule
content: When are the midterms and final exams scheduled?

title: Late Work Policy
content: What happens if I submit an assignment late? Is there a penalty?

title: Contact the Professor
content: How do I contact the professor? What are their office hours?
